agentRecommendation.reasoning: After twinning resolution: candidate A (Pulpit Rock dawn) is recommended for place-cape-schanck-01 as the more geographically specific match. That leaves candidate C (Bushrangers Bay track view) as the strongest remaining option for home cover. 4032x3024, Peninsula-verifiable via Mornington Peninsula National Park. SA override required. The hinterland-to-coast geometry works for 'the Mornington Peninsula as a place'. Alternative: if editor prefers, give candidate A to home cover and shift Cape Schanck place page to candidate B.
agentRecommendation.alternativeRecommendation: Select home-cover-01-a (Pulpit Rock dawn) and shift place-cape-schanck-01 to candidate B

rejected.note: Recommended for place-cape-schanck-01 instead — anti-twinning. Can be reassigned here if editor prefers.
2592px barely clears minimum, no crop headroom. Approach-grade, not cover-grade.
DJI drone shot — hard-rejected per brief.
